intended_use: The VUNO Med-DeepBrain is intended for automatic labeling, quantification and visualization of segmentable brain structures from a set of MR images. The software is intended to automate the current ma
intended_use_full: The VUNO Med-DeepBrain is intended for automatic labeling, quantification and visualization of segmentable brain structures from a set of MR images. The software is intended to automate the current manual process of identifying, labeling and quantifying segmentable brain structures identified on MR images.
target_condition: Brain structural analysis; white matter hyperintensities
other_metrics: Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) score ≥0.80 for brain regions and white matter hyperintensities; average relative volume errors: Hippocampus 0.03 mm³, Thalamus 0.01 mm³, Lateral ventricle 0.01 mm³; average absolute volume errors: Hippocampus 207 mm³, Thalamus 140 mm³, Lateral ventricle 377 mm³; intraclass correlation coefficient >0.965 for brain structures and >0.988 for WMH
